first_source_query: Kokorowski 2001 multiphoton beam deflection broadening calibration kappa uncertainty
acceptance_focus: accept only if the source provides beam_deflection_broadening_calibration.csv with minimum columns branch_or_intensity,calibration_observable,value,value_se,units,independence_basis,source_note and supports recover raw beam-deflection/broadening calibration tables with independent kappa uncertainty provenance
overclaim_boundary: do not count digitized contrast agreement as G11 closure without calibration uncertainty provenance

first_source_query: Mir et al. 2007 record distribution paired visibility curve raw data
acceptance_focus: accept only if the source provides record_distribution.csv with minimum columns which_way_strength_or_setting,record_coordinate,record_value,record_value_se,visibility_or_contrast,visibility_or_contrast_se,independence_basis,source_note and supports recover a paired visibility or contrast sweep measured under the same record-distribution settings
overclaim_boundary: do not count an independent record distribution without a paired visibility-loss curve

first_source_query: Eibenberger et al. 2014 independence provenance independent record distribution raw data
acceptance_focus: accept only if the source provides independence_provenance.md with minimum columns setting,record_observable,record_value,record_value_se,visibility_or_contrast,visibility_or_contrast_se,independence_basis,source_note and supports recover an independently measured record distribution with provenance separate from the visibility fit
overclaim_boundary: do not count visibility-derived record variables as independent distribution-to-visibility validation
